criticalRules: Matrices must be entered as Scilab expressions in exprs
A, B, C, D matrices define the state-space system
Default is [-1, 1, 1, 0, 0] - a simple first-order system
description: Continuous Linear State Space - State-space representation of continuous-time linear systems
anomalies: exprs contains 5 values but only 4 realParameters (flattened matrices)
Initial state is in exprs[4] but realParameters only contains ABCD
name: CLSS
commonUses: Modeling physical systems from differential equations
